properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v7 v11

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We are more than conquerors We don't have to be afraid Nothing is as powerful As His love

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh, the way He gave His Son To give life to everyone Not a thing can separate us From His love

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: It's the life and the hope that He brings His forgiveness that leads us to sing

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We are free to love Like our God has loved We are free to give like He gave

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We are free from sin We are free to begin To forgive as He forgave We are free

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: We are living evidence He restores our innocence Jesus stands in our defense All for love

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: It's the grace and the peace that He brings His forgiveness that leads us to sing

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: We are free from sin We are free to begin To forgive as He forgave We are free, we are free

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Nothing can separate us Nothing can separate us, Lord Nothing can ever take us from You

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Nothing can separate us Nothing can separate us, Lord Nothing can ever take us from You From You

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: Oh, we are free from sin We are free to begin To forgive as He forgave We are free, we are free, oh yeah
